name: German Chocolate Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine sugar, flour, salt, and cinnamon.
2. Gradually add milk to the mixture in the saucepan.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened. This should take about 5-7 minutes.
4. Continue cooking for an additional 2 minutes. Remove from heat.
5. Blend in the melted chocolate.
6. Stir a small amount of hot mixture into the eggs, then return all to the pan, stirring constantly.
7. Cook for 1 minute (do not boil). Remove from heat and stir in the coconut.
8. Cool the mixture completely before blending in the cream.
9. Chill the mixture until ready to use.
10. Stir in the chopped pecans.
11. Churn-freeze the ice cream, making sure it reaches a proper consistency for serving. This recipe makes 2 quarts of German Chocolate Ice Cream.
